draw_eligibility_rules: draw must be after history_end_draw (no lookahead)
draw must be officially published before evaluation
evaluation only after actual winning number is confirmed
protocol.no_lookahead_rule: All predictions are generated using only draws with CAST(draw AS INTEGER) <= CAST(history_end_draw AS INTEGER). Target draw is strictly excluded from training data.
protocol.leading_zero_serialization_rule: All ticket numbers are serialized as exactly 3 decimal characters with leading zeros. Ticket (0,5,9) serializes as '059'. Ticket (0,0,1) serializes as '001'. Range: '000' to '999' (1000 possible tickets).

output_schema.generated_at: ISO8601 timestamp when prediction was generated
output_schema.history_end_draw: draw ID of the last draw included in training
output_schema.target_draw: draw ID to predict (NEXT_AFTER_CURRENT_MAX if unknown)
output_schema.top_n: number of tickets in prediction set
output_schema.predicted_numbers: list of top_n ticket tuples e.g. [[0,5,9],[1,2,3]]
output_schema.serialized_predictions: list of top_n zero-padded strings e.g. ['059','123']
output_schema.hit_result: null until actual draw is known

protocol.evaluation_method: When actual draw arrives: (1) fetch winning digits from draws table, (2) serialize as 3-digit string with leading zeros, (3) check if serialized winning ticket is in serialized_predictions for each top_n, (4) record hit_result as HIT or MISS per strategy per top_n, (5) update evaluation_status to EVALUATED. No DB writes during evaluation — update JSON artifact only.
p100_readiness_criteria: direct hit rate at top20 > 15% across evaluated draws
ensemble_v2 edge > 0 at top20 on prospective draws
no regime change detected (rolling 3-draw hit rate stable)

leading_zero_serialization.rule: ticket (d0,d1,d2) serialized as str(d0)+str(d1)+str(d2) with no separator

criteria: direct hit rate at top20 > 15% across evaluated draws
ensemble_v2 edge > 0 at top20 on prospective draws
no regime change detected (rolling 3-draw hit rate stable)
